name: OppFi Inc.
business: OppFi is a tech-enabled specialty finance platform that partners with banks to extend credit access to everyday Americans who are underbanked. The company facilitates unsecured personal installment loans through its OppLoans platform, with an average loan amount of approximately $1,950 and an average term of 11 months. As of December 31, 2025, OppFi had facilitated over $8.6 billion in gross loan issuance since inception.

exposures.sentence: OppFi is a tech-enabled, mission-driven specialty finance platform that broadens the reach of community banks to extend credit access to everyday Americans.

catalysts.sentence: OppFi rolled out the Model 6.1 refit in the fourth quarter of 2025 and plans to fully implement it in the second half of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 48 million everyday Americans are underbanked and currently lack traditional options, according to a 2023 study published by the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (the FDIC).
tamClaims.sentence: Approximately 48 million everyday Americans are underbanked and currently lack traditional options, according to a 2023 study published by the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (the FDIC).
